loan_amount.description: Loan amount drives HMDA LAR reporting, TRID disclosures, and AUS submission — must be highly accurate

loan_purpose.description: HMDA requires loan purpose; incorrect routing affects ATR/QM analysis, secondary market delivery

borrower_last_name.description: Borrower identity field — required for OFAC screening, credit pull authorization, legal instrument

borrower_first_name.description: Borrower identity field — required for ECOA adverse action notices and HMDA

borrower_ssn_masked.description: SSN used for credit pull, IRS verification, CIP — tokenized/masked only; high accuracy required

debt_to_income_ratio.description: DTI is an HMDA-reportable field and a critical ATR/QM underwriting metric; errors affect eligibility

ltv_percent.description: LTV drives PMI requirements, LLPA pricing, secondary market eligibility, and HMDA combined LTV

property_state.description: Property state determines HMDA MSA assignment, state compliance rules, and license requirements

property_zip.description: ZIP code used for census tract assignment (HMDA), flood determination, and property tax estimation

occupancy_type.description: HMDA requires occupancy; affects pricing LLPA, ATR analysis, and secondary market delivery eligibility

interest_rate_percent.description: Note rate required for HMDA rate spread calculation and HOEPA/HPML determination

total_monthly_income.description: Critical for DTI calculation; errors cascade to underwriting decision and HMDA income field

loan_type.description: HMDA reportable; drives FHA/VA/USDA guarantee processing, MIP/funding fee calculation

application_date.description: HMDA application date; triggers 3-business-day LE delivery clock under TRID

purchase_price.description: Required for LTV calculation on purchase transactions; errors affect AUS eligibility

base_monthly_income.description: Primary income component; drives DTI and HMDA income reporting

employer_name.description: Employment verification anchor; lower threshold acceptable since VOE will verify

property_type.description: HMDA construction method and property type fields; affects LLPA, condo review requirements

down_payment_amount.description: Drives LTV and cash-to-close calculation; verification via asset documentation

outstanding_judgments.description: URLA declaration — misrepresentation is fraud; extraction must distinguish checked vs. unchecked boxes
